data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for transitioning from discovery facts to explicit share request.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to transition from discovery facts to an explicit share request, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process but do not address this requirement, indicating a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of validation for the ability to transition from discovery facts to explicit share request.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the transition from discovery facts to explicit share request.
